seoTitle: Sheldon vs Shelly Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sheldon and Shelly Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sheldon vs Shelly Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sheldon and Shelly Beach.
heading: Sheldon vs Shelly Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sheldon, Queensland and Shelly Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sheldon has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Shelly Beach (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sheldon or Shelly Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sheldon has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Shelly Beach scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sheldon scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Shelly Beach scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sheldon or Shelly Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sheldon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
